microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's resilience validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized simulation-and-recovery system, sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and SOPs that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring zero-defect deployment.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to cut cycle time by **39%** and expand drill capacity by 21%, enabling the team to scale POC-style engagements without adding headcount.

Surfaced critical feature gaps by facilitating 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, directly influencing the roadmap to add **intent-based YAML generation** to the platform.
Improved documentation retrieval by migrating content to an AI-powered semantic search system with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time by 83%** across internal engineering teams.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, then built a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and reduce operational burden at scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments and measure progress against reliability targets.

Implemented **automated CI/CD pipelines** in partnership with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across distributed robotic systems.
Stabilized the developer intake process by facilitating Agile ceremonies and resolving **40+ high-priority backlog tickets**, improving sprint predictability for a fast-moving embedded systems team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that standardized customer-facing workflows.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion by 2.7% through a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for targeted local demand.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, delivering pricing model improvements that directly improved leadership's resource allocation decisions.
